    base:desc "Concrete data traces gathered from the cyber‑physical system and enriched with metadata.",

]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity and validity are addressed through traceability and verification of the model‑based development chain. Reliability depends on the correctness of underlying models and the transformations applied to data (e.g., SysML to simulation models). Verification methods include checking the conformance of concrete models to reference models, ensuring the correctness of transformation rules, and validating white‑box Simulink simulations against expected physical behavior. Uncertainty sources stem from model approximations and data noise; these are managed by maintaining fine‑grained traceability of data traces to their origin, enabling error detection and correction. Quality assurance processes comprise systematic verification of transformations, adherence to reference model constraints, and the use of traceability links to guarantee that each derived data trace can be audited back to its source models and inputs."
]
